tools.Name: CloakBrowser
tools.Description: A stealth Chromium binary with source-level C++ patches to evade advanced bot detection systems.
tools.Use_Case: Automated web scraping and agent interactions on sites with high-security bot protection (e.g., Cloudflare, reCAPTCHA).

tools.Name: Stable Diffusion Web UI
tools.Description: A comprehensive web interface for Stable Diffusion providing advanced image generation, editing, and restoration features.
tools.Use_Case: Local image generation, inpainting, outpainting, and AI-assisted art creation.

tools.Name: oMLX
tools.Description: An optimized LLM inference server for Apple Silicon featuring continuous batching, tiered KV caching (RAM/SSD), and menu-bar management.
tools.Use_Case: Running local LLMs and vision models on macOS with high efficiency and low-latency prefix caching.
